title: Peppery Kenyan Potato Wrap
description: A peppery, crispy, and comforting Kenyan dish featuring cider vinegar, boiled potatoes, and a lacto-vegetarian friendly filling, all wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: Boil the diced potatoes in salted water until they are tender, then drain and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the boiled potatoes, cider vinegar, black pepper, and salt to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, prepare the pandan leaves by washing and drying them with a paper towel.
Spoon the potato mixture onto the center of each pandan leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the pandan leaves over the filling to form a wrap, and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Serve the wraps warm, with a side of yogurt for dipping.
